reviews.title: Good watch. Has sensory issues
reviews.text: Husband loves his Christmas gift. Only complaint we have is he has flick his wrist multiple times very hard to get it to light up. He plans to see if there’s  anything he can on his end to not have to that. It’s a great watch for the price.

reviews.title: Great watch
reviews.text: This watch did everything I needed it to do.  It keeps very accurate time and has many excellent features.  The ones I was most interested in were the sleep tracker, heart and blood pressure monitor and step counter as these  are medically necessary.  The accuracy was top of the line.  My only issue is this watch caused the area on my skin that contacted the watch to get a bad rash.  While the rash was essentially harmless, it is caused by a chemical reaction in my body.  Not the watches fault, and I've experienced this side effect with other watches in the past.  Now I use it only occasionally and for only a couple of days at a time to still track the previously mentioned condition.  It's a great watch that I would recommend.

reviews.title: Quality
reviews.text: It works well but I was disappointed that I can't answer a call or cancel a incoming call from the watch.

reviews.title: The Perfect Watch
reviews.text: The mobile app is easy to navigate. The watch if very accurate with HR and steps counted. The battery lasts my husband approximately 3 weeks.

reviews.title: Nice watch for the money. Now we see how long it lasts.
reviews.text: Works good so far.

title: Vowor 4G Smartwatch for Kids with Sim Card, Waterproof Phone Watch with WiFi LBS GPS Tracker Video Chat SOS Camera Alarm Clock Anti Lost Watches Children Boys Girls Birthday Gift Age 3-15 (Black)
description:
Vowor Smart watches 4G for Kids
Kids smartwatch supports 4G/3G/2G Nano sim card with data and voice plans.
GSM Bands:
US: B2/B5
3G Bands (WCDMA):
US: B2/B5
4G Band(FDD TDD):
US:B2/4/5/7/12/17
Note:
1. you need to have voice and data plan to make the kids phone watch works properly 2. The Vowor 4G kids phone watch is NOT compatible with Verizon or Sprint, we recommend T-Mobile, Speedtalk and AT&T. But it is ok if your own's phone (parent's) card is Verizon or Sprint. The Vowor kids smartwatch doesn't support other APP except Leefine.
Q&A:
1. Why the watch doesn’t have the network(The watch shows "Search ... " for a long time)
(1) The SIM card is not overdue. (2) Check the upper left corner of the watch interface for stable signal icons or up and down arrows. If no, please restart the watch. (3) There may be no set the correct APN.
2. Why the watch cannot recognize the SIM card
(1) Confirm that the SIM card is not overdue. (2) Confirm that the SIM card is installed in the right direction. (3) Power off before card insertion. (4) Change the region and try again.
3. Why can't I make a video call
(1) Confirm that the SIM card has data and the network signal is stable. (2) Check whether the APP side is disabled for video calls. (3) Other family members who want video calls need to have a Leefine account and bind the watch. (4) Whether all permissions of APP needed are granted. (5) The APP needs to be opened, run and work in the background. Only the video call is initiated on the watch end, the APP end can receive the push message. (6) The video call has just ended. It will take 5 minutes for the watch end to call again.
Package Included:
1 x Kids smartwatch 1 x USB cable 1x User manual 1x Watch screen protector 1x sim card
features: 【Vowor 4G Kids Smart watch】: the smartwatch kids 4G has all functions you need: Face-talk (video calling), wifi LBS GPS Tracker, geofencing, Pedometer, Voice chat, Texts, Anti-lost, Class Mode, HD Camera, Historical tracker, Safe zones, Remote monitoring, SOS, alarm clock, low battery notification etc. It is a great gift for your kid 3-15 years old.

【Two-way Calling】: the Vowor 4G kids phone watch supports video calling and voice calling, you can chat with your kids face to face, but also can make a voice call. Make sure your sim card have the plan with Voice & Data: voice plan is for calling, and data plan is for network.

【4G WIFI LBS GPS Tracker】: Double position technology based on AGPS, Location Base on Cell Tower Station means double safety for kids. GPS is suitable for outdoor(especially in open areas),with a little inaccurate; WIFI is suitable for indoor, the accuracy depends on the carrier's backend database; LBS depends on the density of the communication base station and where you are, the inaccurate is relatively large. The watch choose GPS first, then WIFI, and finally the LBS. At the same time, parent

【Safety Protection】: 4G smartwatch for Kids equipped with an LBS/GPS/WIFI system that accurate location, you can check the real-time location of your kids and history activity footprint. You can also set the child's range of activity, if the child leaves the set area, the geofencing feature will alerts you. Accurate activity tracker, built-in speed sensor.

【1-year Warranty】: The kids smartwatch is made of high quality material, anti-fall and durable. The band strap is made of soft Silicone, it is very comfortable to wear it and it does not scratch the hand. We will provide 1-year warranty, replacements such as band strap or data cords will be send out for free. If you have any problems about our smart watches, Please feel free to contact us first. We will reply you within 24 hours.

reviews.title: Comfortable, worth the value
reviews.text: The band that originally came with the Fitbit was so uncomfortable. It dig into my wrist and left marks. I ordered another band that was about the same price as all four of these. It was useless. Barely fit, and it wouldn’t keep its position, so I decided to try these. First, I couldn’t believe that the same price got me FOUR bands in different colors! The bands are easily adjustable. Once fitted, these stay in place on the wrist. They’re comfy, and they stretch enough so that I can pull off the Fitbit to charge without having to readjust the band. Though inexpensive, this particular purchase was one of the best I’ve had this year, LOL.

reviews.title: Really love them but 2 already broke after 2 weeks
reviews.text: I really love these, I hate the bands that come with the fitbits. These are really comfortable but 1 band wouldn't work for some reason then another band broke after 2 weeks without even consistently wearing it.

reviews.title: Did NOT Work with Sense 2
reviews.text: Not sure what the issue is, but I could not get any of these bands to engage and lock with the Sense 2.  The tab fits into the slot just fine, but it won't engage the locking tab to hold the band into place.  Pulling on the band at all causes it to simply fall out of the watch case.  The bands themselves look fine, but not locking into place obviously makes them worthless for their intended purpose.

reviews.title: DO NOT BUY worked less than 60 days and no customer support.
reviews.text:
DO NOT WASTE YOUR MONEY. YOU WILL REGRET IT!!!!
UPDATE: Less than 60 days and the watched completely stopped working.
Being new to using a smart watch I didn't want to invest a fortune. Read lots of reviews and decided to give this one a try. It is perfect. It does everything I want it to do. It looks great. It is simple to set it up as you want. AND they provided exceptional customer service!

reviews.title: Not worth it
reviews.text: This watch has never worked and the instructions did not help.

reviews.title: There are TWO ways of rating this... Garbage or almost garbage.
reviews.text:
There are two ways of rating purchases... either an overall evaluation IRREGARDLESS of the price OR... CONSIDERING THE PRICE. Considering I paid $20 for it... not horrible. BUT here are the SERIOUS flaws so far:

-The Blood Pressure monitor is a COMPLETE JOKE. "Inaccurate" is NOT the word. I tried it on several friends and coworkers. Garbage!
-You are supposed to be able to make a gesture of bringing your wrist up to view the watch and then it is supposed to turn the screen on so that you can read it. ALMOST NEVER! No matter HOW I make the gesture the only thing that works is a PAINFUL twist/shake of my wrist and then it's not guaranteed. I just use the button instead which kind of defeats the purpose.
-BUT THEN, when sleeping.... EVERY DAMNED MOVEMENT I MAKE it turns on... and waking up my wife, because it is like having a flashlight shone in your face!!!!!!!!!!!

So... EVEN THOUGH this was only $20... SAVE YOUR MONEY FOR SOMETHING THAT ACTUALLY WORKS AND WORKS WELL.

reviews.title: Great Smart Watch!
reviews.text: It is a great dupe of Apple Watch.  I absolutely love it. The greatest attraction is the extended battery time (7 to 10 days). I also like various fitness track features such as step count, heart-beat, workout routine. I could check weather too. Another interesting feature is the multiple watch face options. However I struggled a bit figuring out how to change those watch faces. The watch faces can be changed easily using the APP. I found the questions and answers mentioned on the webpage pretty helpful when figuring out other elements.

reviews.title: Bad watch!
reviews.text: The mobile app works fine! But after five months the watch failed to take a charge!! Try a new charger and the watch still wouldn't take a charge! Now I have a Dead watch! A watch should last longer than five months!!!!!

title: SAMSUNG GEAR S3 FRONTIER Smartwatch 46MM (Bluetooth Only) - Dark Grey (Renewed)
description:
Stay in touch, without reaching for your phone, with the smartwatch that’s engineered for adventure. Convenience being the key feature, the watch offers fitness tracking, app access and watch face customization. With the Gear S3, you can pay right from your wrist and track your location as well. The Gear S3 is compatible with both Android and iOS smartphones.
Never Miss a Moment
The Gear S3 is Bluetooth connected so you can receive texts, emails, and alerts without reaching for your phone. With a built-in speaker and microphone, you can also make and answer calls hands-free. Just rotate the distinctive steel bezel to easily access apps and notifications so you can instantly check texts, updates, and more.
Pay with Your Watch
With Samsung Pay on your Gear S3, you can easily make payments with your watch almost anywhere you can swipe or tap a credit card - even without your phone or wallet.
Get Out There
Whether you’re off-roading or exploring a new city, the built-in GPS tracks your activity and makes it easy to share your location.
Designed for The Elements
The military-grade Gear S3 is tough enough to handle the elements. It resists water, dust, extreme temperatures, and the occasional drop so you can venture out with confidence.
Go for Days
Go nonstop for days on a single charge.4 When it’s time to recharge, the wireless charger lets you power up without slowing down.
Tailored to You
Make the Gear S3 your own. Customize your watch face, choosing from thousands of striking colors and designs. Plus easily swap out the standard 22mm band.
features: The Samsung Gear S3 has an always-on watch face and distinctive steel bezel that you can rotate to access apps and notifications.
The Samsung Gear S3 has an always-on watch face and distinctive steel bezel that you can rotate to access apps and notifications.
Text, call and get notifications directly from your watch through your Bluetooth connected smartwatch.
Access the apps you use every day on your Gear S3. Catch a ride, check scores, stream music, and more.
With the built-in S Health app, track your steps, monitor your heart rate, and more.

reviews.title: Just over 90 days and it completely died

The new battery is fine, charges up and works, but the watch will not even turn on with new battery in it.

reviews.title: Love this
reviews.text: Love this watch

reviews.title: Husband LOVES This
reviews.text: I bought this for my husband for his birthday and Father's Day and he loves it. He used to have a Galaxy S9, but dropped it into a lake while we were fishing *face palm*. But he ended up getting an old S7 from a family member and the watch connects with that as well. The only complaint I have heard from him is about the band, which was easy and cheap to replace with a metal material that didn't stick to his wrist as much as the rubbery band that comes with the watch.

reviews.title: Good watch
reviews.text:
I bought this when it first came out, I needed it's walking and stair climbing metrics.

It's big, heavy, and if you're at all active, it's on the charge cradle for around 1 hour. The big, heavy part, some like it, I wish it were a little smaller. The battery life, it's an early version, I didn't expect much, my next watch, 20 day minimum.

All in all, it's a very functional watch, feature laden, and good, as long as Samsung supports the OS

reviews.title: Watch is good, not great with mybphone
reviews.text:
The watch is great. Synched quickly with the app and I like the number of different face options offered. The battery life is also strong and it charges quickly.
Things I didn't like. If you touch the face it quickly unlocks and scrolls through the menus. So when I cross my arms I can mess up the watch, it needs a better lock. The app didn't synch all options to my watch/phone. So, I couldn't track sleep, heartrate and other things.
Maybe if I have a better phone?

reviews.title: Great Apple alternative!
reviews.text: Got this for my mom, here it is next to my Apple Watch, it has pretty much all the same features as the Apple at about a quarter of the price. The battery lasts all day and seems to be on par with the battery life of my watch. The app is easy to use and my mom loves it!

reviews.title: Awesome Smart Watch
reviews.text:
For the money, this is an awesome smart watch that has some of the same popular features as that “fruit” brand.
The watch was packaged securely in a box and included a User Manual and a “How to Connect with the smart watch” brochure.

My watch was received with 46% battery life and did not need to be charged immediately, but I noticed that the charge cord is magnetic and attaches easily to the back of the watch.

I read the instructions and powered on the watch. I downloaded the app and proceeded to pair, referred to as “bind” in the manual. The smart watch paired effortlessly with my iPhone 13. Other than pairing or unpairing, the user manual doesn’t cover much else, but I found the watch use to be intuitive. I do think a more detailed user manual would be helpful to explain navigating and swipe direction of the screens.

The watch has many functions and I was pleasantly surprised that the watch provided a “Siri connection” and performed flawlessly. I compared the blood pressure and oxygen sensors to my individual monitors to check accuracy. Surprisingly, the watch is pretty accurate.

As I mentioned earlier, I started using the watch with 46% battery life and wore the watch for approximately 25 hours before I received a low battery alert.

This is a great buy and so much so, that within hours of using my watch, I ordered another one for my husband.

reviews.title: Best watch yet!
reviews.text: I'm very impressed with this smart watch. It has so many features and works well. Definitely recommend it.

𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐞: 𝐎𝐧𝐥𝐲 𝐟𝐮𝐧𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐰𝐡𝐞𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐰𝐚𝐭𝐜𝐡 𝐩𝐚𝐢𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐩𝐡𝐨𝐧𝐞, 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐫𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐯𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐚𝐜𝐜𝐞𝐬𝐬 𝐢𝐧 𝐀𝐏𝐏.

【𝟒𝟐𝐦𝐦 𝟔𝟎 𝐅𝐏𝐒 𝐓𝐨𝐮𝐜𝐡 𝐒𝐜𝐫𝐞𝐞𝐧】Features a 42mm (1.7'') coloful touch screen, narrow bezels provide 20% more visible area allow you see more information at a glance and easier touch control on this fitness watch. Enjoy the vivid animation with this 60 FPS screen.

【𝐘𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐇𝐞𝐚𝐥𝐭𝐡 𝐀𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞 & 𝐒𝐥𝐞𝐞𝐩 𝐓𝐫𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠】Features blood oxygen & heart rate monitor, this fitness tracker can track your heart rate all day and alert you once your heart rate reach safe threshold. It can track your sleep peroid: Light, Deep and REM sleep stage. If you'd like to know your blood oxygen level, just a press on the watch and it will start to mearsure.

【𝐅𝐮𝐥𝐥𝐲 𝐅𝐮𝐧𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐅𝐢𝐭𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐬】Up to 100 sports modes, this watch will meet all your need on exercise! After connected to your phone, it can also record your ourdoor route and display in App. Features weather forecast can let you know how the weathe going and plan your exercise!

【𝐆𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭 𝐁𝐚𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐲 𝐋𝐢𝐟𝐞 & 𝐁𝐥𝐮𝐞𝐭𝐨𝐨𝐭𝐡 𝟓.𝟑】290mAh battery provides up to 8 days using or 30 days standby. Equips with bluetooth 5.3, compatible with Android 9.0 and iOS 11.0 or above, you can experience faster, wider and low delay connection.

reviews.title: Easy set up and can text and phone calls
reviews.text: I like the looks and it tells me to get off my ass and move.

reviews.title: Decently priced
reviews.text: Chose this watch because of the simplicity and overall look.  The step counts and sleep features work very well.  Battery life is approximately 2 days use when using the push button feature.  If you enable the sensor to come on with your wrist approximately 1 day use.  Charge works very well and quickly.  The downfall is definitely the rubber banding.  The piece that holds the excess band tends to move.  Call feature is ok for the price and messaging is ok.  I primarily needed for an alarm, clock and date.

reviews.title: great smartwatch
reviews.text: I bought this for my uncle for his birthday. He wanted a smart watch to monitor his health. He liked it and it was easy for him to set up.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: I had an Apple Watch before this. This is really no different than the Apple Watch,  everything that worked on there works fine here! Did find a screen protector  it is (Smaat 1.7”) it fits perfect! And touch screen still works fine. as far as I can tell there are no other bands made for this type of connection, which is kind of ridiculous. So if the band breaks, you literally have to buy a new watch don’t like that! Also, wish it could at least have the temperature on the screen! And there are only certain screens that have the power level or day and date, and you cannot pick a screen from your photos, etc. and add the date. Just trying to inform people of all of the things that I was looking for in reviews and no one ever mentioned any of these hopefully it helps!

reviews.title: Nice watch!
reviews.text: I bought this watch to track my fitness mainly.  I'm not the type of person who's into gadgets per se but I think this is a winner.  It's not expensive but still stylish and functional.

title: Smart Watch (Answer/Make Call), 1.7" Smartwatch Fitness Tracker for Android and iOS Phones with Heart Rate Sleep Tracking, 28 Sport Modes, Blood Oxygen, Ai Voice Control,Fitness Watch for Women Men
features: 【Smart Watch Bluetooth Call and Smart Notification】After connecting the watch with your phone, you can directly dial the phone number on the screen to make or answer the call. Also you can receive SMS and APP messages (Text, Facebook, WhatsApp, Instagram, Twitter...) you won't miss any important information.

【All-Day Activity Health Tracking】The fitness watch records daily steps, distance, calorie consumption. It can track and analyse Sleep time and heart rate, also monitor blood oxygen. All data can be synchronized to your phone for analysis and to help you create a scheduled routine to meet your health goals.

【28 Sport Modes and Life Assistant】 It supports 28 sport modes, such as swimming, running, climbing, Yoga, and so on. It can also work as an assistant: music and camera control, weather display, sedentary reminder, drink water reminder, alarm clock, stopwatch, flashlight, find phone, which help you live a convenient life.

【1.7" HD Full Touch Screen and Customized Watch Face】High texture metal watch frame with 1.7 "TFT full touch colorful screen bring comfortable touch and excellent visual experience. There are 150+ different watch face styles to choose in the App. You can also customize your watch faces with your loved photos. Also, watch screen will light up every time you raise your hand.

【IP68 Waterproof Smart Watch for Android IOS Phones and 235mAH Long Battery Life】The smart watch is compatible with iOS 9.0 and Android 4.4 and above devices. The smartwatch with 235mAH battery capacity can be fully charged in about 2 hours, and it can be used for 2 days bluetooth call. Support 20 days standby time.

reviews.title: Poor Measurements - Support Cannot Help
reviews.text:
After charging for 30 minutes as instructed, I paired the smart watch with the app. This was easy, and the one reason I gave it 2 stars instead of 1. The other reason for 2 stars, the interface was easier to use than I expected.

But if the measurements are not accurate, ease of use doesn't matter.

I bought this smart watch to track my heart rate while exercising—mainly walking. After recent heart procedures, my doctor wants me to keep my pulse below a certain rate. Each time I measure, the pulse differs substantially from the pulse oximeter that always agrees with my doctor's office pulse oximeter, and heart monitor. It goes as high as 90 when the PO says 52. I took multiple measurements, including taking my own pulse. The closest measurements were 60 when the actual rate was 51 or 52.

Support is through a chat on the app. I did not wait long for support, however they did not try to help me. They insisted that the heart rate changes. That I had to let it sync with the app. Not once did they address the possibility that the smart watch might be reading the rate wrong. Told me to try again after I had already tried multiple times.

Focusing on anything but the issue I am reporting does not help me. Even suggesting I exercise and measure my heart rate. Telling me the human heart rate is constantly changing. Literally, answers like they were talking to a small child.

I had high hopes for this device. It disappointed on two levels - Heart Rate, Support. I cannot recommend. Look for a different smart watch if you need accurate heart rate measurements.

reviews.title: NOT AS DESCRIBED AT ALL
reviews.text: I carefully read all reviews before purchasing this smart watch but was so disappointed. It would not hold preferences & kept defaulting to kg & cm. Would not toggle from one thing to another on app. Had to go all the way out of app & go back in before it would toggle from steps to profile to anything else. Sometimes I'd get my cell to ring on my watch, never could answer it or text back from the watch. I'd rather pay the extra & get an apple watch that actually works. I can't tell you how many times I set the preferences & saved them only to find it defaulted right back the next day.  One of the sorriest watches I've ever owned & I kept it 2 weeks before returning it really trying to make it work.

reviews.title: Better than name brand. Long battery life!!
reviews.text: I will take this watch over a fit bit any day! In fact my husband bought me a fit bit and I returned it because thus watch is soooo much better. What I like most is the BATTERY LIFE IS AMAZING! I bought it weeks ago and have only charged it twice.

reviews.title: Never dies
reviews.text: This thing is great.  Does everything you would expect and the battery lasts FOREVER!!  Great smartwatch.

reviews.title: Sleep function is worthless
reviews.text: I really like this watch, has everything I wanted and everything works with one exception:  the sleep analysis feature is worthless.  It only records sleep between 10:00 pm and 8:00 am and if you move or get up it screws up everything. Good customer service, they really try to help, but they will tell you if you get up to go to the bathroom, watch begins recording all over again. Too bad!

title: iTOUCH Explorer 3 Smartwatch (with Heart Rate Tracking, Step Counter, Notifications)
features: HEALTH AND FITNESS TRACKER: The iTouch Explorer 3 smartwatch has a built-in pedometer and a heart rate monitor that automatically tracks your steps, calories burned, cardiovascular activity and sleep. With up to 7 days of battery life!

BONUS FEATURES: Receive notifications for calls, texts, and social media. Daily weather and the 7-day forecast on your wrist. Turn your Explorer 3 into a shutter button with Camera Remote. Control your phone’s music without taking it out of your pocket with Music Remote. Set reminders to drink more water, wash hands, even get up and move around when you’ve been sitting too long. Open our mobile app to track female health, log meals, water intake, weight changes and caffeine consumption.

RUGGED DESIGN: The iTouch Explorer 3 is IP68-rated water resistant with a durable glass screen and a metal bezel to protect your device through general wear and tear. Battery working time: about 7-10 days; Standby time: 30 days.

SPORT MODES: Add another dimension to your fitness with Sports Mode. Choose from a variety of options. Activate to track steps, distance, and calories. Workouts automatically sync with the mobile app so you can look back at your entire history.

FITNESS GOALS: Stay motivated by setting goals in the iTouch Wearables app for steps, calories burned, sleep, water intake, weight and more. Check the app to see all your completed goals. LARGE WATCHFACE LIBRARY: Choose from built-in watch faces, create your own or access the LARGE watch face library in our mobile app! MOBILE PHONE COMPATIBILITY: Connect your Explorer 3 to any Android or iPhone using the iTouch Wearables app*. (*requires iOS 13 or higher and Android 9 or higher)

reviews.title: The itouch EXPLORER 3 SMART WATCH is great for monitoring your health
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:1dfba93f62e565c5c393181e1d06cded]] What I liked about the ITOUCH EXPLORER 3 SMART WATCH is the very accurate way it keeps track of your health it’s designed with your health in mind it’s easy to use and very easy to setup and stylish and sturdy comfortable wrist band and the battery life is fantastic easy to read dial and it’s a good value for your money it makes a great gift
